subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of grace, thy flowing verses were perused; their meanings were as a breeze bearing the fragrance of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بذیل عنایت اشعار آبدار ملاحظه گردید معانیش نسیمی بود که شمیم محبت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
